'''Lonn Idd's repair station''' was the space station headquarters of [[Lonn Idd]], who concentrated on repairing droids. In this station, [[Tig Fromm]] tried to steal a powerful [[Laser/Legends|laser]] from Idd, but this attempt was stopped by Idd's children [[Vik Idd|Vik]] and [[Nikki Idd|Nikki]] with help of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

{{Station-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This space station was introduced in [[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic issue]] released in [[1986]] by [[Marvel Comics]], where it appears unnamed.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]] {{1st}}
